scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,worker,customer,admin,cashier -c blue,magenta,green,yellow,cyan "npm run dev -w services/api" "npm run dev -w services/worker" "npm run dev -w apps/customer-web" "npm run dev -w apps/admin-web" "npm run dev -w apps/cashier-web"
scripts.setup:api: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='services/api/.env';if(!fs.existsSync(p)){fs.copyFileSync('services/api/.env.example',p);console.log('Created',p,'— edit DATABASE_URL with your Supabase password');}else{console.log(p,'already exists');}"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @checkout/shared && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
